title: Add second real school photo to gallery and update image assets

requirements.summary: Add FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg as a second real campus image in the Gallery section alongside the existing FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg
acceptanceCriteria: FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg is stored in frontend/public/assets/ and referenced correctly
The Gallery section displays both FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg and FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg as real campus photos
Both images render without broken image errors
The gallery layout accommodates two or more real photos gracefully

file_operations.description: Update the Gallery component to display both real campus photos (FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg and FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg) from frontend/public/assets/. Replace placeholder image references in the gallery grid with these two distinct real photographs while maintaining the existing hover zoom effects and layout structure. Ensure both images are referenced using the correct asset path and that the gallery gracefully displays multiple real photos.
